title: doma #1430
definition:
1) a building, house
 2) a part of a building, dining room, hall
 3) house top, roof
    3a) the house tops of the Orientals were (and still are) level and
        frequented not only for walking, but also for meditation and
        prayer
nasbUsage:

    NASB:  a house, a housetop:
